hero.title: AI Notes Summarizer
hero.description: Turn long notes into focused summaries with key points, action items, and saved document history.

flow.title: Paste -> Summarize -> Review -> Save
steps: Paste or edit the source notes
Review key points and action items

differences.title: Make long notes easier to revisit
differences.description: AI Notes Summarizer focuses on turning lengthy notes into clear, reviewable summaries that stay attached to the original document.

items.title: Document first
items.description: Begin with the complete notes that need review.

items.title: Summary history
items.description: Keep generated summaries linked to the saved document.

items.title: Review outputs
items.description: Use the summary, key points, and action items as a focused reference.

feel.title: A shorter path through long notes
feel.description: The workflow keeps attention on the important information without losing the source material.

items.title: Paste the notes
items.description: Start with the full material to summarize.

items.title: Generate the summary
items.description: Condense the notes into clearer review material.

items.title: Reopen later
items.description: Use saved documents and summary history when revisiting the topic.

audiences.title: Who uses AI Notes Summarizer
audiences.description: Useful for anyone reviewing lengthy notes.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Review lengthy working notes more efficiently.

items.title: Researchers
items.description: Create focused summaries from detailed notes.

technicalSection.title: Built as App #023
technicalSection.description: AI Notes Summarizer follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: User-scoped backend records across NotesDocuments, NoteSummaries, and SummaryJobs.
Protected typed API workflow with generated frontend OpenAPI types.
